name: Poblano Chili Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 Poblano chiles roasted, peeled, and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, place the tomatillos and cilantro stems. Blend until chopped.
2. Add the roasted, peeled, and seeded poblano chiles, sour cream, chicken stock, vegetable oil, lime juice, garlic, and salt.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Store refrigerated until ready to use.
